arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: First January signing CLOSE, Tavares WANTED, Felix BOMBSHELL
arts.sum: Chelsea Transfer News Today: First January signing CLOSE, Tavares WANTED, Felix BOMBSHELL The 24-year-old is currently on loan at Lazio from Arsenal, but the deal is set to become permanent for a fee of less than €10 million this summer, and Chelsea have initiated talks over a possible move during discussions about Cesare Casadei’s proposed switch to the Italian capital.

arts.ttl: Juventus Target Renato Veiga as Giuntoli Seeks Last Minute Defensive Reinforcements
arts.sum: Juventus are scouting the Premier League market to bolster their defensive lineup, with Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli aiming to secure at least one, if not two, new defenders. This move comes in response to Bremer's injury and the imminent departure of Danilo, who is expected to terminate his contract and join Napoli. The post Juventus Target Renato Veiga as Giuntoli Seeks Last Minute Defensive Reinforcements appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca drops double Chelsea transfer hint amid Andrey Santos calls and midfielder injuries
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has ruled out the possibility of Chelsea recalling a midfielder from loan in the January transfer window amid injuries to Enzo Fernandez and Romeo Lavia. Maresca revealed on Friday that four players were doubts for Chelsea's Premier League clash with Wolves, including Fernandez and Lavia, who are both suffering with "fatigue or muscle problems".

arts.ttl: Report: £60m Chelsea target is close to reaching agreement with another club with Blues yet to overcome one hurdle

arts.ttl: ‘No doors closed’ as Garnacho holds Napoli and Chelsea talks
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho’s future ‘remains open’ amid interest in the Manchester United winger from Chelsea and Napoli. Garnacho is subject of interest from rival clubs heading into the final week of the January transfer window.
